per_point_gate_action: When fix_type at capture is FLOAT or AUTONOMOUS (not FIXED RTK), this point's score is zeroed. Other points continue to score. Per-point aggregation penalizes this point but does not kill the chain.
v2_1_q_lock_note: Q-CP-2: promoted to per-point gate. FLOAT/AUTONOMOUS fix on a single point zeros that point; aggregation dilutes across fleet.
